pattern: The array's maximum is always the root, and the elements before and after it form independent left and right subarrays, so the same rule applied recursively rebuilds the whole tree.
hints: Whatever the largest number is, it sits above everything else, so it must be the root of the current span.
Once the max is the root, the slice to its left and the slice to its right are themselves smaller instances of the exact same construction.
Recurse on index ranges: find the index of the maximum in lo..hi, make it the node, then build left on lo..max-1 and right on max+1..hi.

edge_inputs.description: max in the middle with both sides
single element is the whole tree
strictly decreasing forces a right-only spine
strictly increasing forces a left-only spine

stress.description: permutation of distinct values so the max is always unique
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    n = rng.randint(1, max(1, min(size, 1000)))
    vals = rng.sample(range(0, 1001), n)
    return [vals]
stress.note: distinct values guarantee a unique maximum at every step
